items.name: EditorState
items.doc: The adapter's central state — owns the document and coordinates all layers.

items.name: new
items.doc: Create a new editor state with an empty document.

items.name: from_markdown
items.doc: Create an editor state from a Markdown string.

items.name: apply
items.signature: pub fn apply(&mut self, cmd: Box<dyn Command>) -> Result<(), CommandError>
items.doc: Apply a command to the document via the undo stack.

items.name: undo
items.signature: pub fn undo(&mut self) -> Result<bool, CommandError>

items.name: redo
items.signature: pub fn redo(&mut self) -> Result<bool, CommandError>

items.name: to_markdown
items.doc: Get the document as a Markdown string.

items.name: open_file
items.signature: pub fn open_file(&mut self, path: &Path) -> Result<(), EditorError>
items.doc: Open a Markdown file — resets document, cursor, undo stack.

items.name: save_file
items.doc: Save the current document to its file path.

items.name: save_file_as
items.signature: pub fn save_file_as(&mut self, path: &Path) -> Result<(), EditorError>
items.doc: Save the current document to a specific path.

items.name: selected_text
items.doc: Get the selected text, if any.

items.name: EditorError
items.doc: Adapter-level errors combining command and file errors.
